heading: National Intelligence University acceptance of grants
label: 3227d National Intelligence University acceptance of grants
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1034 of act , was renumbered section 1033 and is classified to .July 26, 1947section 3227c of this title

children.heading: Authority
children.label: a Authority
children.text: The Director of National Intelligence may authorize the President of the National Intelligence University to accept qualifying research grants.

children.heading: Qualifying grants
children.label: b Qualifying grants
children.text: A qualifying research grant under this section is a grant that is awarded on a competitive basis by an entity referred to in subsection (c) for a research project with a scientific, literary, or educational purpose.

children.heading: Entities from which grants may be accepted
children.label: c Entities from which grants may be accepted
children.text: A qualifying research grant may be accepted under this section only from a Federal agency or from a corporation, fund, foundation, educational institution, or similar entity that is organized and operated primarily for scientific, literary, or educational purposes.

children.heading: Establishment of account
children.label: 1 Establishment of account
children.text: The Director shall establish an account for administering funds received as qualifying research grants under this section.

children.heading: Use of funds
children.label: 2 Use of funds
children.text: The President of the University shall use the funds in the account established pursuant to paragraph (1) in accordance with applicable provisions of the regulations and the terms and conditions of the grants received.

children.heading: Related expenses
children.label: e Related expenses
children.text: Subject to such limitations as may be provided in appropriations Acts, appropriations available for the National Intelligence University may be used to pay expenses incurred by the University in applying for, and otherwise pursuing, the award of qualifying research grants.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: f Regulations
children.text: The Director of National Intelligence shall prescribe regulations for the administration of this section.
